listitem.para: [bdubbs] - Add rnnoise-0.2. Supports mlt at ticket #23495.
[jlocash] - Update to pangomm-2.56.2 and pangomm-2.46.5. Fixes #23500.
[xry111] - Update to llvm-22.1.8 and libclc-22.1.8. Fixes #22937.
[renodr] - Fix CVE-2026-55200, CVE-2025-15661, and CVE-2026-55199 in libssh2 (Security Update). Fixes #23485.

[renodr] - Update the Perl module dependencies to their latest versions. This includes Business-ISBN-Data-20260617.001, Clone-0.50, DateTime-TimeZone-2.68, HTTP-Message-7.02, List-SomeUtils-XS-0.59, Role-Tiny-2.002005, Test-Simple-1.302222, TimeDate-2.35, and WWW-RobotRules-6.03. Fixes #23486.

[renodr] - Update the Python module dependencies to their latest versions. This includes certifi-2026.6.17, chardet-7.4.3, charset-normalizer-3.4.7, commonmark-0.9.2, editables-0.6, hatchling-1.30.1, idna-3.18, meson_python-0.20.0, msgpack-1.2.1, pathspec-1.1.1, pytz-2026.2, setuptools_rust-1.12.1, setuptools_scm-10.1.2, snowballstemmer-3.1.1, and uv_build-0.11.24. The vcs_versioning module was added for setuptools_scm. idna-3.18 and msgpack-1.2.1 are security updates. Fixes #23487.
[jlocash] - Update to Vulkan-Headers and Vulkan-Loader 1.4.350.1. Fixes #23468.
[jlocash] - Update to SPIRV-Headers and SPIRV-Tools 1.4.350.1. Fixes #23462.
[jlocash] - Update to firefox-140.12.0esr and js-140.12.0 (spidermonkey) (Security Update). Fixes #23453.
[bdubbs] - Revert fltk to version 1.3.11 for compatibility with vncviewer (in tigervnc).
[jlocash] - Update the gstreamer stack to 1.28.4 (Security Update). Fixes #23444.
[bdubbs] - Update to audacious and audacious-plugins-4.6.1. Fixes #23428.
[jlocash] - Update to libinput-1.31.3 (Xorg driver) (Security Update). Fixes #23416.
[bdubbs] - Update to audacious and audacious-plugins-4.6. Fixes #23398.
[bdubbs] - Fix building sphinx and sphinx_rtd_theme with docutils-0.23. Fixes #23393.
[pierre] - Patch wpa_supplicant for OpenSSL-4. Part of #23330.
[bdubbs] - Update to evolution and evolution-data-server-3.60.2. Fixes #23341.
[bdubbs] - Update to libisofs-1.5.8.pl02 and libisoburn-1.5.8.pl02. Fixes #23354.
[pierre] - Add dependencies of HTTP-Daemon (perl module). Part of #23327.
[pierre] - Fix serf for OpenSSL-4. Part of #23330.
[pierre] - Update to Net-SSLeay-1.96 (Perl dependency). Part of #23278.
[bdubbs] - Update to XML-LibXML-2.0213 (Perl dependency) (Security update). Fixes #23278.
[pierre] - Fix MIT Kerberos for OpenSSL-4. Part of #23330.
[pierre] - Fix openldap for OpenSSL-4. Part of #23330.
[bdubbs] - Update to SPIRV-Headers and SPIRV-Tools 1.4.350.0. Fixes #23290.
[bdubbs] - Update to Vulkan-Headers and Vulkan-Loader 1.4.350.0. Fixes #23269.
[jlocash] - Update to gpgme and gpgmepp 2.1.0. Fixes #23321.
[jlocash] - Update to HTML-Parser-3.85 (Perl module) (Security Update). Fixes #23326.
[bdubbs] - Update to KDE Gear 26.04.1. Includes falkon, kate, and kwave. Fixes #22916.
[jlocash] - Update to lxml-6.1.1 (Python module) (Security Update). Fixes #23319.
[jlocash] - Update to firefox-140.11.0esr and js-140.11.0 (spidermonkey) (Security Update). Fixes #23111.
[bdubbs] - Update to kf6-6.26.0. Includes extra-cmake-modules, breeze-icons, frameworks, kconfig, kidletime, kwindowsystem, and solid in lxqt section. Fixes #22953.
[bdubbs] - Update to qt-everywhere-src-6.11.1 (Security Update). Partially of #23291.
[jlocash] - Fix CVE-2026-40930 in libpng (Security Update). Fixes #23307.
[renodr] - Fixed building nmap with OpenSSL-4. Fixes #23297.
[jlocash] - Update to libwww-perl-6.83 (Perl Module) (Security Update). Fixes #23287.
[jlocash] - Update gstreamer stack to 1.28.3 (Security Update). Fixes #23285.
[renodr] - Fixed compiling libqalculate against GCC 16 by regenerating the build system.
[renodr] - Fixed building Inkscape against poppler-26.05.0 and later. Fixes 23288.
[renodr] - Fixed runtime issues in MariaDB when using OpenSSL-4.0 and later. Fixes #23282.
[renodr] - Fixed building libheif against SVT-AV1-4.1. Fixes #23279.
[renodr] - Adjusted bluez to build with libical-4.
[renodr] - Fixed some of the tests in NSS against sqlite-3.53.0. This affected the dbtests in particular.
[jlocash] - Update to urllib3-2.7.0 (Python Module) (Security Update). Fixes #23266.
[jlocash] - Update to firefox-140.10.2esr and js-140.10.2 (spidermonkey) (Security Update). Fixes #23111.
[jlocash] - Update to firefox-140.10.1esr and js-140.10.1 (spidermonkey) (Security Update). Fixes #23111.
[jlocash] - Add a patch for mitkrb to fix 2 CVE's (Security Update). Fixes #23215.
[jlocash] - Update to Text-CSV_XS-1.62 (Perl Module) (Security Update). Fixes #23217.
[renodr] - Update to intel-media-driver-26.1.5 as well as gmmlib-22.10.0. Fixes #23178.
[renodr] - Fix compatibility problems in FreeRDP-3.25.0 that cause gnome-connections to fail to authenticate to systems.
[bdubbs] - Add editorconfig-core-c in support of the forthcoming gnome-text-editor.
[bdubbs] - Update to GNOME-50. Fixes 35 separate tickets..
[jlocash] - Update the rsync patch for CVE-2026-41035 (Security Update). Fixes #23154.
[jlocash] - Update to libXpm-3.5.19 (Xorg library) (Security Update). Fixes #23175.
[jlocash] - Update to lxml-6.1.0 (Python module) (Security Update). Fixes #23162.
[bdubbs] - Move intltool from LFS to BLFS General Utilities.
[bdubbs] - Move XML::Parser from LFS to Perl Modules.
[bdubbs] - Update to pytest-9.0.3 (Python module) (Security Update). Fixes #23115.
[jlocash] - Update gstreamer stack to 1.28.2 (Security Update). Fixes #23113.
[jlocash] - Fix building inkscape with poppler-26.04.0. Fixes #23103.
[zeckma] - Moved UEFI boot support to LFS but kept efivar and efibootmgr.
[bdubbs] - Update to libinput-1.31.1 (Xorg driver) (Security update). Fixes #23078.
[jlocash] - Update to libburn libisofs and libisoburn-1.5.8. Fixes #23088.
[bdubbs] - Update to systemd-260.1 (Sync with LFS). Fixes #23024.
[bdubbs] - Update to vim-9.2.0272 (Sync with LFS, Security Update). Addresses #12241.
[zeckma] - Update to firefox and spidermonkey 140.9.0esr (security update). Fixes #23030.

[bdubbs] - Add a security patch to Python-3.14.3. See
for details.
[bdubbs] - Update to qt-everywhere-src-6.11.0 (Security update). Partially fixes #23019.
[bdubbs] - Update to vim-9.2.0161 (Sync with LFS). Fixes #22986.
[bdubbs] - Update to Perl modules Business-ISBN-3.013 and Business-ISBN-Data-20260311.001. Fixes #22939.
[xry111] - Update to llvm-22.1.0 and libclc-22.1.0. Fixes #22859.
[renodr] - Update to intel-media-driver-25.4.6 and gmmlib-22.9.0. Fixes #22881.
